metadata.summary: A python library which interact with AWS services

documentation: This is the custom Python library developed by one of student of NCI.

methods.name: aws_service_pkg.aws_service.AWSService.upload_image_to_s3
documentation: AWS S3 - Uploads a file object to an S3 bucket and returns the object key

methods.name: aws_service_pkg.aws_service.AWSService.get_presigned_url
documentation: To get pre-signed URL for a private S3 object, that will display property images on website

methods.name: aws_service_pkg.aws_service.AWSService.delete_image_from_s3
documentation: For image delete function from S3 bucket

methods.name: aws_service_pkg.aws_service.AWSService.send_email_via_lambda
documentation: Email-sending method via API Gateway and will trigger Lambda to send email

methods.name: aws_service_pkg.aws_service.AWSService.notify_admin
documentation: Notify Admin for new property creation via AWS Lambda
